catalog.note: Route paths and elevation profiles are simplified display traces for TRMNL rendering, not navigation data.

trail.name: Mojave Road

season.label: Oct-Apr
season.note: Cooler months are preferred; check preserve road conditions after storms.

trail.highlight: A long desert crossing stitched together by history, dry lakes, springs, and wide sky.

obstacle.name: Afton Canyon Crossing
obstacle.blurb: A water and sand decision point near the route's western end.
